subcodes.first_line: Hearken thou unto My Call from the direction of the Prison, that there is none other God but Him, Who hath ever been one God, single and alone [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع ندائی عن جهه السجن بانه لا اله الا هو لم یزل کان الها واحدا فردا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @oneness; unity of religion, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
